spec_match.rationale: The demo now teaches the current property grammar, uses auto and none, and probes that highlight is rejected.

interactive.rationale: The page has an auto/none selector, previous and next controls, reset, marker links, and live target/current readouts.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page frames scroll-target-group as the container opt-in for real anchor scroll markers.

edge_cases.rationale: It demonstrates :target versus :target-current, disabled grouping, and the stale highlight value rejection.

references.rationale: The wrong ChromeStatus ID was replaced with chromestatus.com/feature/5189126177161216.

design_system.rationale: The page uses shared CSS variables and no raw color literals.

summary: The canonical page no longer teaches the invalid highlight value and now compares :target with :target-current using the spec values auto and none.
